name: Dairy-Free Pasta "Cheese" Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Olive oil or water for sauteeing
2 tsp Chicken-flavored vegetable broth or light miso
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat green onions and olive oil in a medium skillet over low heat for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add flour and whisk until smooth. Gradually add nutritional yeast and water, whisking continuously to combine into a smooth sauce. Stir in tahini and vegetable broth.
2. Continue whisking the sauce over low heat until it begins to bubble. Add soymilk and whisk until well combined. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly. Season with freshly ground black pepper and ground rock salt, if desired.
Yields 1 1/2 to 2 cups of sauce, enough for one pound of pasta.
Variation: Stir in 2 cups of cooked corn before serving over 1 pound of thin green pasta.
